# Third-Party Material

Only third-party files strictly required by an artifact workflow may be placed
here. Every component needs a pinned upstream source, an unmodified license,
and a manifest of imported files and local modifications.

- `qwen3/LICENSE`: Qwen3 license associated with the Qwen3-0.6B importance
  matrix under `data/imatrix/`. Model weights are not redistributed.

No implementation or reproduction of a comparison method is included.
